subject: [PATCH v4 03/21] mm: swap: add an abstract API for locking out swapoff

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a need for the abstract API to handle swapoff locking in the new virtual swap design. Asked the author to consider adding more documentation and comments to explain the purpose of the API.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch series introduces an abstract API for locking out swapoff, which is necessary in the new virtual swap design where a swap entry might not have a backing swap device and its backend can change at any time.
